news.title: New ChatGPT 5.4 Model Is 'Built for Agents.' Will It Lure Back Claude Converts?
news.snippet: OpenAI stepped into that void, releasing new models. The company previously announced it had struck a $200 million deal with the defense department in 2025.

tech.title: Python Artificial Intelligence Tutorial: Your Gateway to AI Mastery
tech.snippet: Practice Regularly: Experiment with different datasets and algorithms. Read Documentation: Libraries like Scikit-learn, TensorFlow, and PyTorch have excellent documentation.
